hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: The Mango Guest House in Aswan offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and garden views. Each room includes a kitchenette, balcony, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy spa facilities, a sun terrace, and a lush garden. The property features a restaurant, bar, and outdoor fireplace. Additional amenities include a fitness room, yoga classes, and a steam room.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves Middle Eastern, local, and barbecue grill cuisines. Breakfast options include full English, vegetarian, vegan, halal, and gluten-free.
Prime Location: Located 1.1 km from the Nubian Museum and 1.9 km from the Unfinished Obelisk, the guest house is 17 km from Aswan International Airport.

hotels.description_en:
Beachfront Location: Crystala guest house in Aswan offers direct beachfront access with a sun terrace and lush garden. Guests enjoy free WiFi, a restaurant, bar, and outdoor seating area.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and modern amenities. Family rooms and private check-in and check-out services ensure a comfortable stay.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves African cuisine with halal, vegetarian, and vegan options. Breakfast is continental, and meals include brunch, lunch, dinner, and high tea.
Local Attractions: Nearby attractions include the Nubian Museum (1.2 km), Kitchener's Island (4-minute walk), and the Unfinished Obelisk (2 km). Aswan International Airport is 17 km away.

hotels.description_en:
Beachfront and Leisure: Nala Narty Nubian House & Organic Farm in Aswan offers a private beach area, beachfront, sun terrace, and lush garden. Guests can relax by the outdoor fireplace or enjoy the on-site restaurant, which serves local cuisine in a traditional setting.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms with free toiletries, and garden or river views. Additional amenities include a hot tub, spa bath, private pool, and family rooms. The hotel is pet-friendly and provides free WiFi throughout.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves brunch, lunch, and dinner with halal, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Breakfast is available in-room, and the buffet includes vegetarian, vegan, and halal selections.
